---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for Switchyard
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who hits it and how often?

## Proposed solution

How would the feature work? Sketch the user-facing surface — CLI flag, config field, API method.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you try or consider? Why is the proposal preferable?

## Scope notes

- Is this a new role/component in the chain (RequestProcessor / LLMBackend / ResponseProcessor / ResponseTranslator), or an extension of an existing one?
- Does it touch a public API listed in `switchyard/__init__.py.__all__`?
- Backward-compatibility concerns?

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other routers, references.
